# Dilemma Creative

> Social media beheer & content creatie voor food & beauty ondernemers in Vlaanderen.

## About
Dilemma Creative is a social media management and content creation agency based in Flanders, Belgium. We specialize exclusively in two niches: food/horeca and beauty/wellness businesses.

## Services
- Social media management (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn)
- Content creation (photography, videography, reels, stories)
- Social media strategy and planning
- Paid social advertising

## Target Audience
Food entrepreneurs (restaurants, bakeries, cafés, food brands) and beauty entrepreneurs (salons, skincare brands, aesthetic clinics) in Flanders, Belgium.

## Contact
- Email: hello@dilemmacreative.be
- Website: https://dilemmacreative.be
- Language: Dutch (nl-BE)
